workload_profile.reasoning: EKS-based microservices (backend API + security scanner), RDS PostgreSQL, Secrets Manager, IRSA. Multi-AZ for prod. GitOps-ready (ArgoCD). Moderate traffic, stateful, security-sensitive.

security.rationale: KMS, IRSA, private subnets, VPC Flow Logs, CloudTrail. Placeholder secrets need rotation.

reliability.rationale: Multi-AZ RDS for prod, 2 AZs, backup retention. EKS single node group.

cost_optimization.rationale: NAT Gateway per AZ; no VPC endpoints for S3/ECR. Cost tags present.

operational_excellence.rationale: CI with lint, test, security, SBOM, promote gate. No runbook linkage.

observability.rationale: VPC Flow Logs, CloudTrail. Missing: RDS CloudWatch logs, CloudWatch alarms.

compliance_evidence_quality.rationale: Audit logging present. Compliance mapping not documented.

findings.title: No CloudWatch alarms for RDS, EKS
findings.recommendation: Add CloudWatch alarms for RDS CPU, RDS connections, EKS node health.

findings.title: No VPC endpoints for S3, ECR
findings.recommendation: Add VPC gateway endpoint for S3, interface endpoints for ECR to reduce NAT data transfer cost.

findings.title: CloudTrail S3 bucket lacks encryption
findings.recommendation: Add server-side encryption to CloudTrail S3 bucket.

findings.title: CI pushes to GHCR, not ECR
findings.recommendation: Add ECR push step for AWS deployment; platform-infra provides ECR and ecr_push_policy_arn.
